---
title: "Language Models"
description: "Introduction to NLP and Language Models"
description-short: "Introduction to NLP and Language Models"
duration: 60 mins

editor: { render-on-save: true }
---

## Slides

{{< revealjs "slides/slides-03-language-models.html" height="600px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}


## Outline

- Dealing with natural language
- Language models
